arcgisrouting 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

as_lmd_orders()
Convert spatial objects to Last Mile Delivery orders input
as_lmd_routes()
Convert a data.frame to Last Mile Delivery routes input
as_lmd_zones()
Convert spatial objects to Last Mile Delivery zones input
as_order_specialties()
Convert a data.frame to Last Mile Delivery order specialties input
as_point_barriers()
BarrierType: 0 (restriction) 2 (added cost) Must have accompanying attribute Valid attributes Attr_TravelTime , Attr_Miles , Attr_Kilometers , Attr_Minutes , Attr_WalkTime , Attr_TruckMinutes , or Attr_TruckTravelTime
as_polygon_barriers()
BarrierType: 0 (restriction) 2 (added cost) Must have accompanying attribute Valid attributes Attr_TravelTime , Attr_Miles , Attr_Kilometers , Attr_Minutes , Attr_WalkTime , Attr_TruckMinutes , or Attr_TruckTravelTime
as_polyline_barriers()
BarrierType: 0 (restriction) 2 (added cost) Must have accompanying attribute Valid attributes Attr_TravelTime , Attr_Miles , Attr_Kilometers , Attr_Minutes , Attr_WalkTime , Attr_TruckMinutes , or Attr_TruckTravelTime
as_route_specialties()
Convert a data.frame to Last Mile Delivery route specialties input
as_routes()
Convert a data.frame to VRP routes input
as_stops()
Convert spatial objects to stops for routing
as_vrp_orders()
Convert spatial objects to VRP orders input
decode_compressed_geometry()
Decode Compressed Geometry
.retrieve_travel_modes()
Retrieve Available Travel Modes
find_closest_facility()
Find Closest Facility
find_routes()
Find Routes
find_routes_job()
Find Routes (Async)
find_service_areas()
Solve Service Area
get_travel_modes()
Get available travel modes
last_mile_delivery()
Solve Last Mile Delivery (Async)
route_vehicles()
Route Vehicles
solve_service_areas_job()

solve_vrp_job()
Solve Vehicle Routing Problem (Async)
